pillars.title: Understand before creating
pillars.description: Every project begins with a deep dive — understanding the audience, objectives, constraints, and opportunities before shaping strategy, content, or campaigns.

pillars.title: A system, not a poster
pillars.description: I develop communication materials that work across channels and formats — from newsletters and social media posts to corporate brochures, campaigns, and events.

pillars.title: Launch, measure, refine
pillars.description: The rollout isn’t the end. I manage projects end-to-end, staying involved post-launch to optimize content, messaging, and experiences based on real feedback.

about.sectionSubtitle: Strategic, creative, and hands-on in corporate communication.
bio: With four years in marketing and corporate communication, I oversee projects from brief to execution, crafting content, campaigns, and events that strengthen brand presence and company culture.
Not sure where to start? I map the right strategy, coordinate stakeholders, and deliver the campaigns or initiatives you need to meet your objectives.

gallery.sectionSubtitle: Trois projets récents qui illustrent ma façon de travailler : des briefs ambitieux, des contraintes réelles, des résultats mesurables.

hero.subtitle:
I craft communication strategies and lead projects that bring ideas to life, from content creation and campaigns to events and stakeholder engagement.

Based in Rabat, I help organizations communicate with impact and purpose.

footer.text: Salma — Responsable de communication & Designer, Rabat.
